title: primula wollastonii
intro: Primula wollastonii, also known as Wollaston's primrose or the Kenyan primrose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Primulaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Primula wollastonii include relief from digestive issues, fever reduction, and wound healing, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Primula wollastonii are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
